requirements.title: Broker Root Structure
requirements.description: The broker root shall hold a pipe registry pointer, registry length, and registry capacity.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: Broker API Interface
requirements.description: The broker API vtable shall define Publish and RegisterSubscriber operations.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: Broker Initialization
requirements.description: The broker shall initialize from a caller-provided pipe registry array and capacity.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: Pipe Derivation
requirements.description: A pipe shall derive from the queue module root with an additional message ID field.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: Pipe Initialization
requirements.description: A pipe shall initialize with a message ID and a backing queue array.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: Publish Fan-Out
requirements.description: The broker shall enqueue a message into every registered pipe whose message ID matches the published message ID.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: Publish Non-Matching Skip
requirements.description: The broker shall skip pipes whose message ID does not match the published message ID.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: Register Subscriber
requirements.description: The broker shall append a pipe pointer to the registry on registration.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: Registry Full Rejection
requirements.description: The broker shall return an error status when registration is attempted on a full registry.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: Broker Vtable Validation
requirements.description: The broker shall verify that its API vtable entries are non-null before each operation.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: Broker Registry Validation
requirements.description: The broker shall verify that its pipe registry pointer and capacity are valid before each operation.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: Pipe Validation
requirements.description: The broker shall verify each pipe via the queue verification before publishing to it.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: Single Thread Scope
requirements.description: The broker shall operate within a single thread without thread-safety mechanisms.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.
